title: [SV] Adds a VerbatimAttr to emit verbatim text in extern module parameters
body:
No escape hatch exists for external module parameters like VerbatimOp does for inline SV. VerbatimAttr lets ExportVerilog know to output the string without quotes. This is an important feature for integration of existing, parameterized SystemVerilog code with _extremely_ complex parameters.

Also increases the verbosity of the ExportVerilog parameter type not known error message.
